nodes.name: Focused Resonance
nodes.effect: All psychic and energy weapons +8% damage. Crystal Shard homing +10% accuracy.
nodes.notes: Baseline psychic damage increase

nodes.name: Prism Amplification
nodes.effect: Sustained beam ramp-up time −25% (full power faster). All beam weapons +10% continuous DPS.
nodes.notes: Less time on target needed for full damage

nodes.name: Mind-Shatter Protocols
nodes.effect: Unlocks Mind-Shatter Projector equipment. All psychic attack units +5% confusion effect chance.
nodes.notes: Psychic crowd control branch

nodes.name: Void Scythe Forging
nodes.effect: Unlocks Void Scythe (15% instant kill vs light infantry). All melee attacks +15%. Zealots +1 attack per second.
nodes.notes: Melee power spike — makes Zealots terrifying

nodes.name: Warp Rift Technology
nodes.effect: Battlefield teleportation gates: 1 CP creates two linked portals lasting 15 seconds. 2 uses per battle.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — tactical teleportation on demand

nodes.name: Resonant Armor Growth
nodes.effect: All wraith-bone armor regenerates 0.5% HP/sec passively during combat.
nodes.notes: Passive sustainability baseline

nodes.name: Prismatic Shield Enhancement
nodes.effect: Energy shield absorption 100→150. Recharge delay 10s→8s.
nodes.notes: Meaningful shield upgrade for fragile units

nodes.name: Phase-Shift Harmonics
nodes.effect: Phase Blink base chance +3% (12%→15% base). Displacement distance +1m (2m→3m).
nodes.notes: PRIMARY mechanic upgrade — core Shards identity

nodes.name: Soul-Stone Refinement
nodes.effect: Soul-Stone Ward +10% (20%→30%). All units gain passive 3% baseline resurrection chance.
nodes.notes: Pseudo-Reanimation — the Shards' answer to Necro persistence

nodes.name: Soul-Stone Integration
nodes.effect: All units: 5% base resurrection (total 8% with T3). Return at 40% HP. Auto-capture range 200m.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — halt the extinction curve

nodes.name: Enhanced Grav-Fields
nodes.effect: All Shards units +5% movement speed. Grav-Tank traverses steeper terrain grades.
nodes.notes: Speed is survival for fragile units

nodes.name: Extended Farsight
nodes.effect: Precognitive Warning range +1 system. Sensor detection range +30%.
nodes.notes: See further, plan better — maximize Phase Blink uptime

nodes.name: Dimensional Anchoring
nodes.effect: Commander aura grants immunity to displacement, knockback, and forced teleportation within 50m radius.
nodes.notes: Choose when and where to engage — not the enemy's choice

nodes.name: Chronal Distortion Fields
nodes.effect: Unlocks Chronal Disruptor ability (50% slow for 8 seconds). All units +5% attack speed.
nodes.notes: Time manipulation — slow enemies, speed allies

nodes.name: Chronal Acceleration
nodes.effect: All units +10% movement speed (15% total with T1). Precognitive combat window extends to 5 seconds.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — the Shards move faster through time than their enemies

nodes.name: Wraith-Bone Cultivation
nodes.effect: Wraith-bone unit production time −15%. Equipment repair cost −20%.
nodes.notes: Offset the Shards' production disadvantage

nodes.name: Avatar Awakening Protocol
nodes.effect: Unlocks Avatar of the Ancients production. 8 cycles at Spirit Shrine. 50m Phase Blink aura on deployment.
nodes.notes: Walking cathedral of psychic legacy

nodes.name: Infinity-Mothership Construction
nodes.effect: Unlocks Infinity-Mothership flagship. Requires orbital Shipyard + 10 cycles. Charge time initialized at 15 seconds.
nodes.notes: Reality-warping flagship — the final argument

nodes.name: Hybrid Crystal/Kinetic Forging
nodes.effect: Unlocks Hybrid Crystal/Kinetic Slugs (Legendary: +15% vs BOTH Vorax AND Guardians). 1 set per 5 cycles per Forge.
nodes.notes: The kinetic solution to the Shards' energy-weapon problem

nodes.name: Infinity Lance Optimization
nodes.effect: Infinity Lance charge time 15s→10s. Damage +25%. Beam width increases — sweeps 5 seconds (from 3s pinpoint).
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — faster, deadlier, sweeping destruction
